title: Sonnet 5 vs Opus 4.8 — default effort
effort: default (Claude Code default, held equal on both arms)
pricing_note: Sonnet 5 standard $3/$15, intro $2/$10 through 2026-08-31; Opus 4.8 $5/$25 per MTok. Costs normalized to official published rates.
headline: Cheaper per token != cheaper per task: at matched effort Sonnet 5 emitted 1.56x more output, so it was only ~5% cheaper at standard pricing (37% under intro).
